behavior: A Context persists all four attributes (isolation, allowed providers+keys, visibility, owner) and round-trips through git + the Postgres projection
A work item belongs to exactly one Context and accumulates an append-only event history; re-prioritizing/moving a deadline appends an event and never mutates prior state
The GitHub adapter ingests a repo's open issues (forge->board) and writes status/label back to one issue (board->forge), confirming the write by re-reading not by exit code
A Context with no explicit provider policy resolves to local-only (Ollama); adding a cloud-provider grant flips the resolution (default-deny enforced by test)
